summary: Drop the dead `if tokenURL == ""` guard in client.go's refreshAccessToken; tokenURL is now always non-empty (returned by helper).
reason: client.go:375-378 had `tokenURL := "http://localhost:9001/oidc/token"; if tokenURL == "" { return nil }` — the literal can never be empty, so the guard was dead code. Likely a leftover from a planned OIDC-discovery lookup that never landed.
validated_outcome: Replaced with `tokenURL := c.Config.TokenURL()`. Token refresh now works against any non-local deployment; a config-derived URL replaces the dead guard.
